title: Vikram University MBA Time Table 2026 OUT

detail.title: Vikram University MBA Time Table 2026 OUT
detail.short_info: Vikram University MBA Time Table 2026 released for II and IV Semester exams. Check subject-wise exam dates, MBA New & Old Course schedule, and download PDF at vikramuniv.ac.in.

sections.heading: Vikram University MBA Time Table 2026 OUT

content.text: Vikram University has officially released the MBA Time Table 2026 for II and IV Semester (New & Old Course) examinations for the academic session 2025-26. The exams are scheduled to begin in May 2026. Students can check the complete schedule and download the official PDF from the university website vikramuniv.ac.in.
The timetable covers regular, ATKT, and ex-students. Students are advised to verify all details carefully and prepare according to the given dates.
Download Vikram University MBA Time Table 2026 PDF

links.text: Download Vikram University MBA Time Table 2026 PDF

sections.heading: Vikram University MBA Time Table 2026 Overview

content.text: Vikram University (Samrat Vikramaditya Vishwavidyalaya), Ujjain has announced the MBA II and IV Semester exam dates for 2025-26 session. The examinations will be conducted in May-June 2026 for both New and Old courses.

sections.heading: Vikram University MBA Time Table 2026 Subject Wise

content.text: Students can now check the detailed subject-wise exam schedule for Vikram University MBA 2nd and 4th Semester 2026. The timetable includes dates for core papers as well as specialization subjects in Marketing, HR, Finance, and others.
Exams will be held in two sessions - morning and afternoon as per the university notification.

sections.heading: MBA II Semester (New Course - Regular Students)

rows: Business Research Methods and Decision Science
International Marketing / Marketing of Services / HRM Legislatives / Finance - Banking & Micro Finance
Corporate Taxation / Retail Management / Supply Chain Management / HRM International Strategic / Working Capital Management
Entrepreneurship Management / Industrial Marketing / Sales Management / Compensation Management / Personal Financial Planning

sections.heading: How to Download Vikram University MBA Time Table 2026

content.text: Students can easily download the Vikram University MBA Time Table 2026 from the official university portal. Follow these simple steps to get your exam schedule.

items: Visit the official website of Vikram University at vikramuniv.ac.in.
Navigate to the "Time Table" or "Examination" section available on the homepage or under the student menu.
Look for the link mentioning "MBA II & IV Semester Exam Time Table 2026" or "PG II and IV Sem Exam 2025-26".
Click on the relevant PDF link to open the timetable.
Download the PDF file and save it on your device.
Take a printout for future reference and exam preparation.

content.text: Students should thoroughly check the official timetable and note down all important dates. Keep a copy handy during exam preparation.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in Vikram University MBA Time Table 2026

content.text: The official Vikram University MBA Time Table 2026 PDF contains all essential information required for students appearing in the examinations.

items: Examination name and semester details (MBA II & IV Sem)
Course type - New Course and Old Course
Exam dates and day-wise schedule
Subject-wise paper codes and timings
Categories of students (Regular, ATKT, Ex-Students)
Important instructions and notes for candidates
Controller of Examination signature and official seal.
